The '''wolgiyn tree''' was a [[Tree/Legends|tree]] that grew on<ref name="The Approaching Storm" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Ansion system/Legends|Ansion system]]</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]]. When the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] and their companion [[Bulgan]] were threatened by a flock of dangerous [[kyren]] [[Bird/Legends|birds]], Skywalker noted that the only nearby shelter was a grove of three wolgiyn trees.<ref name="The Approaching Storm" />

==Behind the scenes==
The wolgiyn tree appeared in the [[2002]] novel ''[[The Approaching Storm]]'', written by [[Alan Dean Foster]].<ref name="The Approaching Storm" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]
